case_title: PAZIK WALTER VS BROSIG PETE DBA PETE'S MERCEDES

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $607.80 FILED BY PAZIK WALTER AS TO DEFENDANT BROSIG PETE DBA PETE'S MERCEDES ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-08-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 02
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT BROSIG PETE DBA PETE'S MERCEDES

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PAZIK WALTER IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT BROSIG PETE DBA PETE'S MERCEDES PLTF UNABLE TO SUSTAIN BURDEN OF PROOF BY THE PREPONDERANCE OF EVIDENCE STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
